display_name: IRRI Rice Knowledge Bank — Blast (leaf, collar, node, neck)
licence: IRRI — attribution required for non-commercial use
notes: IRRI is the world authority on rice pathology. Fact-sheet covers Magnaporthe oryzae symptoms, favourable conditions, and cultural + chemical management. Directly relevant to Sri Lankan rice production in irrigated tank systems; render with regional_authority badge and require DOA agronomist sign-off before driving local spray recommendations.
